summary: Completed comprehensive testing of movie sorting feature. All 8 sorting options working correctly with perfect backend-frontend integration.
passed_tests: Backend: All 43 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Backend: GET /api/movies accepts sort_by and sort_order parameters
Backend: All 8 sorting options work correctly (title asc/desc, year asc/desc, rating asc/desc, created_at asc/desc)
Backend: Default sort is created_at desc (Recently Added)
Backend: Sorting validation shows correct alphabetical ordering
Frontend: Sort dropdown displays all 8 options correctly
Frontend: Sort options are clickable and functional
Frontend: Movies reload when sort option changes (verified order changes)
Frontend: Search functionality works with sorting (Avatar search returned 3 results)
Frontend: All UI filters and tabs are present and functional
Integration: Movie order changes correctly when different sort options selected
